skill: One-variable data: Distributions and measures of center and spread
stem: From left to right, the values of the five vertical bars in a box plot are 3, 6, 9, 12, and 15. The box plot summarizes 17 data values. What is the median of this data set?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. The median of a data set summarized by a box plot is the vertical line inside the box (the third of the five bars). Here that value is 9.

Choice B is incorrect: 6 is the first quartile.

Choice C is incorrect: 3 is the minimum.

Choice D is incorrect: 15 is the maximum.
